title: Flash Speedmop Wet Cloth Refills, Fast Easy and Hygienic, Lemon Multi-Surface, 24 Cloths (Package may vary)
features: Trap and lock daily dirt, grease and grime without getting down on your knees
2x thicker and wetter than floor wipes
Wet cloths dissolve through stubborn dirt and grime
description: Product Description Keep your floors grease and dirt free with these Flash Speedmop Wet Cloth Refills. Anti­bacterial - it kills 99.9% of bacteria leaving your floors hygienically clean. It is two times thicker and wetter than floor wipes. With a built-in scrubby strip - it removes really tough stains. The pack of 24 refills fills your home with a fresh lemon scent and leaves the floor shiny. Ingredients Mop Heads and Refills Safety Warning Keep away from children. Keep away from eyes. If product gets into eyes rinse thoroughly with water. Contains methylchloroisothiazolinone/ methylisothiazolinone. May produce an allergic reaction.
